title: Reliable Recount
description: A mod that changes the item count numbers to those from the Create mod!
body: # Reliable Recount ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7ba84d5a50faa9cff393059576ac220cf6965f.png) This is a 1.20.1/26.1 (Neo)Forge/Fabric port of [catboybinary's O123456789.](https://modrinth.com/mod/o123456789) This mod changes the item count numbers to those from Create mod. The numbers have been taken from Create mod's stock GUI. ## Compatible with you favorite mods! ![compat showcase](https://i.imgur.com/tW19EkD.png) ![showcase](https://i.imgur.com/ADTL8hw.png) ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/evanbones/Reliable-Recount/blob/1.20.1/LICENSE) --- [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.com/invite/JcGRdT6Pbx) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/github-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/evanbones/Reliable-Recount)
